commit.subject: LU-19617 quota: check and set lqe_glbl_data
commit.message:
LU-19617 quota: check and set lqe_glbl_data

in qmt_lvbo_init, the "lqe->lqe_glbl_data" could be left as NULL,
which could affect its quota opertions.

Signed-off-by: Hongchao Zhang <hongchao@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Ibd2cc11d34426196b5ebf018f922c86bc3846447
